parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { job_id: $('When Executed by GoPay App').first().json.job_id, n8n_execution_id: $execution.id, operation: 'register_indonesia_wa', gopay_account_id: $('When Executed by GoPay App').first().json.gopay_account_id || $('When Executed by GoPay App').first().json.account_id || '' } }}

={{ (() => { const s = $('Load Register Indonesia WA Settings').first().json.data || {}; const params = { application_key: 'whatsapp', country_iso2: 'ID', country_calling_code: '62', min_available_count: Number(s.sms_min_available_count || 1) }; if (s.sms_max_price_amount_decimal) params.max_price = { amount_decimal: String(s.sms_max_price_amount_decimal), currency_code: String(s.sms_max_price_currency_code || 'USD') }; return { request_id: 'gopay-register-indonesia-wa-' + $('When Executed by GoPay App').first().json.job_id, lease_duration: '900s', acquire_params: params }; })() }}

={{ { job_id: $('When Executed by GoPay App').first().json.job_id, n8n_execution_id: $execution.id, operation: 'register_indonesia_wa', country_code: $('Build WA Probe Input').first().json.country_calling_code, data: { country_calling_code: $('Build WA Probe Input').first().json.country_calling_code, country_iso2: $('Build WA Probe Input').first().json.country_iso2 } } }}

={{ { job_id: $('When Executed by GoPay App').first().json.job_id, n8n_execution_id: $execution.id, operation: 'register_indonesia_wa', state_json: $('Generate Shared Detection Proxy').first().json.state_json || '' } }}

nodes.name: Release Shared Proxy After Setup Failure

={{ { phone: $('Build WA Probe Input').first().json.phone.national_number, country_code: '+' + $('Build WA Probe Input').first().json.country_calling_code, state_json: $('Generate Shared Detection Proxy').first().json.state_json } }}
